mapper.sql: id, real_name, phone, phone_hash, email, id_card, id_card_hash, gender, registered_address, current_address, target_dept_id, target_position_id, offer_salary, probation_months, grade, report_to, work_location, entry_type, salary_account_id, bank_account, bank_account_hash, bank_name, entry_date, status, employee_id, submitter_id, create_time, update_time, encryption_version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO onboarding_application (real_name, phone, phone_hash, email, id_card, id_card_hash, gender, registered_address, current_address, target_dept_id, target_position_id, offer_salary, probation_months, grade, report_to, work_location, entry_type, employment_type, probation_salary_ratio, salary_account_id, bank_account, bank_account_hash, bank_name, entry_date, status, employee_id, submitter_id, encryption_version) VALUES (#{realName}, #{phone, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{phoneHash}, #{email, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{idCard, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{idCardHash}, #{gender}, #{registeredAddress, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{currentAddress, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{targetDeptId}, #{targetPositionId}, #{offerSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{probationMonths}, #{grade}, #{reportTo}, #{workLocation}, #{entryType}, #{employmentType}, #{probationSalaryRatio}, #{salaryAccountId}, #{bankAccount, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{bankAccountHash}, #{bankName, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{entryDate}, #{status}, #{employeeId}, #{submitterId}, 1)
